name: ROAS Drop Analysis
description: Investigate why ROAS dropped. Runs a structured hypothesis tree against spend, attribution, creative, audience, and platform-cost data, narrows to the most likely cause, and recommends remediation paths.
alsoSurfaces: Why did ROAS drop this period?
Was it creative fatigue, audience saturation, rising CPMs, or compound across many?
How confident is the diagnosis, and what evidence supports it?
What specific actions should we take: pause, refresh, shift, raise bids?
beforeWeRun: Drop window: last 7 days vs prior 7 days, or custom?

whatYoullGet.name: Drop confirmation
whatYoullGet.desc: Drop magnitude, period boundaries, severity classification (significant / within variance / compound), historical variance baseline.

whatYoullGet.name: Primary cause
whatYoullGet.desc: Named cause with confidence rating and the specific data behind it. Compound contributors handled honestly.

whatYoullGet.name: Hypothesis tree summary
whatYoullGet.desc: Branches as rows; columns for contribution to drop, evidence, depth investigated.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommended actions
whatYoullGet.desc: 2–4 specific actions (pause creative, shift budget, refresh audience, raise bids) each with expected impact.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Period boundaries, canonical attribution model, ROAS variant, sources read with row counts.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your ROAS-drop diagnostic in ~12 min.
